pages.text:
15.0CT 1997

EG... ..

31 J0I 1997

17840002 25.1.1924

VETERINARY SERVICES DIVISION

MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE & MININ

HOPE GARDENS,

KINGSTON 6.

JAMAICA

July 10, _ 19 97

PI FAST QUOTT

RIVEKENCENA V3/118

The Right Honourable

Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Direction Generale des Affaires Politiques et de Securite

Direction des Nations Unies et des Organisations Internationales 37, quai d'Orsay 75351 Paris

FRANCE

Sir

I have the honour to advise you that Jamaica has decided to become a member of the Office International des Epizootics.

The Government of Jamaica has examined the provisions of the Intermational

Agreement and of the Internal Statutes of 25 January, 1924 and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regards to Article IT of the International Agreement and Article 11 of the Internal Statutes.

The 6th contribution category has been selected by my Government.

The official Delegate of Jamaica to the OIE will be Dr. George. H. Grant who is the

Director of the Veterinary Services Division, Ministry of Agriculture and Mining.

Yours faithfully

Honourable Horace Clarke

Minister of Agriculture & Mining c.c. The Director General, OIE 12, rue de Prony 75017 Paris

FRANCE
